examples: Because these things are unpaired, we have already seen how unpaired electrons play a role in the Stern-Gerlach experiment.
So now what we have is four unpaired electrons.
The paired and unpaired rats in the two boxes were subsequently exposed to five tones used in the fear-conditioning phase of the experiment.
Compared with the unpaired group, the paired group showed significantly increased fear responses in the box that didn't have the other rat's scent.
